title: Too Fast
description: Removes the "moved too quickly" warning and rubber-banding.
body:
***Only required on the sever side.*** Removes the server-side limitations on player speed that result in "player XYZ moved too fast" messages in the console and rubber-banding. 

Code primarily derived from Random Patches's speed limits, which is MIT licensed and thus license-compatible. However, there is practically no other way to do this: [Source](https://github.com/TheRandomLabs/RandomPatches/blob/1.16-forge/src/main/java/com/therandomlabs/randompatches/mixin/ServerPlayNetHandlerPlayerSpeedLimitsMixin.java)

Conflicts with Random Patches. Do not bother installing this if you've installed Random Patches.

Patreon & Discord

You can support me [on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/noobanidus)!

All support for this mod is available on [my Discord]((https://discord.gg/9YVkaee)). You can also keep up with what I'm doing and get notifications streams!
